channel.title: PNallDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from PNallDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: NPR Reporter's Unusual Defense of False Alito Retirement Story Draws Further Criticism
Report: Trump Favors Iran Diplomacy, Keeps Strike Option
item.description: President Donald Trump is keeping full-scale strike options against Iran on the table but has decided, for now, to stick with diplomatic talks, according to The Washington...

item.title: Families Sue Maduro in US Over Venezuela Killings
item.description: Family members of five people killed in Venezuela have filed a federal lawsuit against former Venezuelan President Nicolas Maduro, accusing him of authorizing...

item.title: Rollins to Newsmax: 250th Events Honor Self-Government
item.description: Agriculture Secretary Brooke Rollins told Newsmax on Tuesday that President Donald Trump's semiquincentennial celebration on the National Mall is drawing...
